name: IRC_TN_JOB_POSTING_LOCS_VL
query: SELECT TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.TN_JOB_POSTING_LOC_ID, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.TN_JOB_ID, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.PRIMARY_FLAG, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.FA_GEOGRAPHY_ID, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.FA_GEOGRAPHY_TYPE, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.FA_GEO_LEVEL_TYPES, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.COUNTRY_CODE, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL.FA_GEOGRAPHY_NAME, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL.LOCATION_FQN, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL.CITY_FQN, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL.STATE_FQN, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL.COUNTRY, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL.STATE, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL.CITY, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL.FA_GEO_LEVEL_NAMES, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.CREATED_BY, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.CREATION_DATE, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_TN_JOB_POSTING_LOCS_B TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB, IRC_TN_JOB_POSTING_LOCS_TL TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL WHERE TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSB.TN_JOB_POSTING_LOC_ID = TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL.TN_JOB_POSTING_LOC_ID AND TNJOBPOSTINGLOCSTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
